calendar.matters:
Petitioners Victor Cartagena, Antigone Trimis And Hao Zheng'S Motion For Order To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES M. O'NEAL OF O'NEAL & RUEPPEL, LLP, TEL. NO. 992-3123 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
MARY MCDONNEL, TEL. NO. 509-1914, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; Petitioners Victor Cartagena, Antigone Trimis And Hao Zheng's Motion For Order To Compel Arbitration is granted. The court finds that there is an agreement among the parties to arbitrate under the CC&R'S. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES M. O'NEAL OF O'NEAL & RUEPPEL, LLP, TEL. NO. 992-3123 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
MARY McDONNEL, TEL. NO. 509-1914, RESPONDENT.

RULING - PETITIONERS VICTOR CARTAGENA, ANTIGONE TRIMIS AND HAO ZHENG'S Motion FOR Order To Compel Arbitration IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 1, 2013 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
= (302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Continued To Feb-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James M. O'Neil, Esq. of O'Neil & Rueppel LLP, Tel. 415.992.3123, for petitioners and moving party;
Mary McDonnell, Tel. 415.509.1914, respondent appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: The matter was discussed. Miss McDonnell presented the court with a copy of the proof of service and provided petitioners' counsel with a copy of her opposition. For good cause, the Court continued PETITIONERs VICTOR CARTAGENA, ANTIGONE TRIMIS and HAO ZHENG's Motion For Order To Compel Arbitration to February 25, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 for the court to hear the matter on its merits, to give the parties enough time to resolve their issues and to give petitioners the opportunity to file a reply if they want to. Respondent to provide the court with a copy of its opposition. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Continued To Jan-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERs VICTOR CARTAGENA, ANTIGONE TRIMIS & HAO ZHENG's Motion For Order To Compel Arbitration is Continued on the court's own motion to January 30, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-04-2013 Continued To Jan-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MARY MCDONNELL, TEL. NO. 509-1914, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - PETITIONERS VICTOR CARTAGENA, ANTIGONE TRIMIS and HAO ZHENG's Motion For Order To Compel Arbitration is continued to January 24, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Clerk to give notice to Petitioner's counsel of the new hearing date. The Respondent was also required to file the opposition paper aside from the Declaration which was filed on Dec. 24, 2012. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)
* * * * * * * * *
Called Atty. James O Neil twice and left a voice mail message to give notice of new hearing date of 1/24/13
